fonts.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete font "{{name}}"?

fonts.uploadHint: Upload .ttf fonts to use them in your certificate templates. These fonts must support the characters you plan to use (e.g., Vietnamese).
fonts.ttfOnlyHint: Only .ttf files are supported. Max size 10MB.
fonts.vietnameseSupportNote: Ensure the font supports Vietnamese characters (diacritics) if you plan to use them in certificates.

userGuide.title: User Guide
userGuide.subtitle: How to use the system in an easy-to-understand way.
userGuide.description: This page is written for users who are not tech-savvy. Just follow each step, read the button names carefully, and follow the instructions.
userGuide.slowDown: Slow down a bit to make it easier to get right.
userGuide.contactAdmin: Please ask the administrator or the person in charge of the system. You can clearly state which screen you are on and what you want to do.

step1.title: 1. Login
step1.description: Use the provided account to enter the system. If you forget your password, contact the person in charge.

step2.title: 2. Choose what to do
step2.description: In the left sidebar, choose the appropriate section such as certificates, templates, users, or batches.

step3.title: 3. Fill in information
step3.description: Each screen will have boxes to enter data. Just fill in each box according to the instructions on the screen.

step4.title: 4. Review before saving
step4.description: Check the name, code, dates, and other important information before clicking the save or issue button.

step5.title: 5. Check certificates
step5.description: If verification is needed, use the certificate code to open the lookup page and see the results immediately.

tips: You should only click one button at a time and wait for the result, avoid continuous clicking.
If the screen reports an error, read the red message just below or above the form.
When unsure, go back to the previous page and re-check the information.
You should keep the certificate code or batch code for faster lookup later.

templates.title: Certificate Templates
templates.subtitle: Design and manage your certificate layout templates.
templates.createSubtitle: Set up template details, upload background, and design layout.
templates.noDataSub: Create your first template to start designing certificates.
templates.nameRequired: Please provide a template name in the Settings tab.
